skills.name: Revenged Sevenfold
skills.description: Imbues allies with the power of the goddess. Reflects some of the damage received from enemies 7 times when under the buff. Effects are not applied on certain boss monsters and the buff is removed after reflecting damage is dealt to enemies. (Applied once during PVP)

skills.name: Nachash
skills.description: Use the power of Kabbalah to summon serpents that attack your enemies and remove all removable debuffs from allies periodically. When the party member attacks enemy on the magic circle, the caster recovers HP as much as their HP recovery value.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2 times per 2 seconds
Removes 1 ally debuff every 2 seconds
Duration: 10 seconds
Target: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Ein Sof
skills.description: Creates a magic circle that drastically increases the maximum HP limit of the designated party member for a period of time and applies a buff that decreases the cooldown of skill. Also recovers HP as much as the final HP recovery value of the caster per 5 seconds during Ein Sof. Decrease Cooldown effect does not activate during the Statue of Goddess Laima effect.
skills.effect_text:
Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Increases maximum HP by CaptionRatio %
Recovers HP by CaptionRatio2 per 5 seconds
- Final recovery rate can be changed
Decreases skill Cooldown by 5%
- Duration: CaptionRatio3 seconds

skills.name: Merkabah
skills.description: Summons the wagon of the goddess to explode at a predetermined spot, dealing damage to nearby enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2 times
Number of Targets: 15
Damage increases by 100% against Devil-type enemies

skills.name: Tree of Sepiroth
skills.description: Invoke a magic circle in the shape of the Tree of Sepiroth which continuously restores the HP of allies.
skills.effect_text:

[Tree of Sepiroth: Dievo Sfera]

skills.name: Anagrama
skills.description: Apply debuff that gives continuous damage to the nearby enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second

attributes.name: Revenged Sevenfold: Curse
attributes.description:
* Inflicts [Curse] at a 10% chance for 4 seconds on an enemy when damage is dealt with [Revenged Sevenfold]

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Nachash: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Nachash] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Merkabah: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Merkabah] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Ein Sof: Stacked Healing
attributes.description:
* While under the effect of [Ein Sof], the amount recovered by [Heal] and [Mass Heal] increases by 30%

* While under the effect of [Ein Sof], the amount of HP recovered increases by 30%

* Both effects do not stack with each other

attributes.name: Kabbalah Garments
attributes.description: * When equipped with 4 pieces of [Cloth] armor, movement speed increases by 5 and can block without equipping a shield

attributes.name: Ein Sof: Double Magic
attributes.description:
* [Ein Sof]'s effects are applied to all party members. The maximum HP increase effect and duration of the skill is reduced by half

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Tree of Sepiroth: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases Heal Factor of [Tree of Sepiroth] and Skill Factor of [Tree of Sepiroth: Dievo Sfera] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Ein Sof: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Ein Sof]'s maximum HP increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Nachash: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Nachash] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Merkabah: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Merkabah] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Tree of Sepiroth: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Tree of Sepiroth] and [Tree of Sepiroth: Dievo Spera] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Revenged Sevenfold: Last Chance
attributes.description:
* Removes original effect of [Revenged Sevenfold], changes duration to 1 second per skill level

* Prevents incapable of combat for once during the duration

* Recovers 10% of maximum HP, Invincible for 3 seconds

* Changes cooldown to 5 minutes

attributes.name: Tree of Sepiroth: Dievo Sfera
attributes.description:
* Removes the original effect of [Tree of Sepiroth]

* When casting [Tree of Sepiroth], a magic circle that damages the enemy every 1 second is created

* Magic Circle Duration: 10 seconds

attributes.name: Anagrama: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Anagrama] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Anagrama: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Anagrama] by 1.25% per attribute level
